title: Area code 906

is the telephone [area code](/wiki/Area_code "Area code") in the [North American Numbering Plan](/wiki/North_American_Numbering_Plan "North American Numbering Plan") (NANP) for the [Upper Peninsula of Michigan](/wiki/Upper_Peninsula_of_Michigan "Upper Peninsula of Michigan").

[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [46°N 87°W﻿ / ﻿46°N 87°W﻿ / 46; -87](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Area_code_906&params=46_N_87_W_region:US-MI_scale:1250000)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Area code for the Upper Peninsula of Michigan

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/17/MI_area_code_906.png/250px-MI_area_code_906.png)](/wiki/File:MI_area_code_906.png)

Numbering plan area 906 in Michigan (green)

**Area code 906** is the telephone [area code](/wiki/Area_code "Area code") in the [North American Numbering Plan](/wiki/North_American_Numbering_Plan "North American Numbering Plan") (NANP) for the [Upper Peninsula of Michigan](/wiki/Upper_Peninsula_of_Michigan "Upper Peninsula of Michigan").

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Area_code_906&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Area code 906 was formed in an [area code split](/wiki/Area_code_split "Area code split") of numbering plan area (NPA) [616](/wiki/Area_code_616 "Area code 616") on March 19, 1961. The split was implemented in a [flash cut](/wiki/Flash_cut "Flash cut"), with no [permissive dialing](/wiki/Permissive_dialing "Permissive dialing") period. 906 is among the least populous numbering plan areas in [North America](/wiki/North_America "North America"), serving only about 320,000 people. The latest NANP projections estimate the exhaustion of vacant central office codes for the 906 area code until the early to mid 22nd century, meaning that the Upper Peninsula will not need another area code for several decades.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The area code has inspired an unofficial holiday in the Upper Peninsula on September 6 (906 correlating to the [month/day date](/wiki/Calendar_date#Gregorian.2C_month-day-year_.28MDY.29 "Calendar date")).[[2]](#cite_note-2)

Prior to October 2021, area code 906 had telephone numbers assigned for the [central office code](/wiki/Central_office_code "Central office code") 988. In 2020, *988* was designated nationwide as a dialing code for the [National Suicide Prevention Lifeline](/wiki/National_Suicide_Prevention_Lifeline "National Suicide Prevention Lifeline"), which created a conflict for exchanges that permit [seven-digit dialing](/wiki/Seven-digit_dialing "Seven-digit dialing"). This area code was therefore scheduled to transition to [ten-digit dialing](/wiki/Ten-digit_dialing "Ten-digit dialing") by October 24, 2021.[[3]](#cite_note-pl556-3)

## Service area

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Area_code_906&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Service area")]

The numbering plan area includes in the following cities:

* [Baraga](/wiki/Baraga,_Michigan "Baraga, Michigan")
* [Calumet](/wiki/Calumet,_Michigan "Calumet, Michigan")
* [Escanaba](/wiki/Escanaba,_Michigan "Escanaba, Michigan")
* [Gladstone](/wiki/Gladstone,_Michigan "Gladstone, Michigan")
* [Hancock](/wiki/Hancock,_Michigan "Hancock, Michigan")
* [Houghton](/wiki/Houghton,_Michigan "Houghton, Michigan")
* [Iron Mountain](/wiki/Iron_Mountain,_Michigan "Iron Mountain, Michigan")
* [Ironwood](/wiki/Ironwood,_Michigan "Ironwood, Michigan")
* [Ishpeming](/wiki/Ishpeming,_Michigan "Ishpeming, Michigan")
* [Kingsford](/wiki/Kingsford,_Michigan "Kingsford, Michigan")
* [L'Anse](/wiki/L%27Anse,_Michigan "L'Anse, Michigan")
* [Marquette](/wiki/Marquette,_Michigan "Marquette, Michigan")
* [Manistique](/wiki/Manistique,_Michigan "Manistique, Michigan")
* [Menominee](/wiki/Menominee,_Michigan "Menominee, Michigan")
* [Newberry](/wiki/Newberry,_Michigan "Newberry, Michigan")
* [Norway](/wiki/Norway,_Michigan "Norway, Michigan")
* [St. Ignace](/wiki/Saint_Ignace,_Michigan "Saint Ignace, Michigan")
* [Sault Ste. Marie](/wiki/Sault_Sainte_Marie,_Michigan "Sault Sainte Marie, Michigan")

[Isle Royale National Park](/wiki/Isle_Royale_National_Park "Isle Royale National Park") and [Mackinac Island](/wiki/Mackinac_Island "Mackinac Island") also use the 906 area code.

[Bois Blanc Township](/wiki/Bois_Blanc_Township,_Michigan "Bois Blanc Township, Michigan") in the only municipality associated with the Upper Peninsula to not use area code 906. It is an island in [Lake Huron](/wiki/Lake_Huron "Lake Huron") whose only ferry service is with the closer [Lower Peninsula](/wiki/Lower_Peninsula_of_Michigan "Lower Peninsula of Michigan"), and therefore uses [area code 231](/wiki/Area_code_231 "Area code 231").

Most of the numbering plan area is in the [Eastern Time Zone](/wiki/Eastern_Time_Zone "Eastern Time Zone"), except for the counties bordering Wisconsin, which are in the [Central Time Zone](/wiki/Central_Time_Zone "Central Time Zone").
